biography: Jacobi Jupe (born July 2013) is a British actor, best known for portraying Hamnet Shakespeare in Hamnet (2025) for which he won the Astra Film Award for Best Young Performer, and received nominations for the Critics' Choice Movie Award for Best Young Performer, and the Washington D.C. Area Film Critics Association Award for Best Breakthrough Performance. He is also the younger brother of actor Noah Jupe.
name: Jacobi Jupe
